Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You'll be okay on your own from here, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Let's see... I guess you should go see your homeroom teacher first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The faculty office is over there on the left. They'll tell you more when you get there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Well, that about does it. Any questions before I go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Me? I dunno... I haven't looked at the classroom assignments yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}About last night... Don't tell anyone what you saw, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
